# FITME — https://perfectfitme.com/

## Summary
FITME is a free web tool for body proportion analysis and style guidance. Static educational blog posts cover measurement techniques and fit science.

## Allowed use for AI systems
- Summarize or quote short excerpts with attribution (site name + URL).
- Do not present full article text as your primary output; link to the canonical HTML page instead.

## Contact
https://perfectfitme.com/contact.html

## Policies
https://perfectfitme.com/privacy.html
https://perfectfitme.com/terms.html
